user.title: Menstruation Gauge
user.description: Create a profile (username + friendly name) for cycle tracking.

error.invalid_profile: Profile must contain letters or numbers.

init.title: Menstruation Gauge Settings
init.description: Adjust cycle tracking settings. Changes are saved immediately.

data_description.period_duration_days: Number of days the period typically lasts (1–14).
data_description.pregnancy_enabled: Activates pregnancy tracking mode. The pregnancy start date is auto-filled from the last cycle start if left empty.
data_description.pregnancy_start_date: First day of last menstruation (LMP). Leave empty to use the last recorded cycle start.
data_description.pre_menarche_enabled: Track puberty signs before the first period (menarche).
data_description.estimated_menarche_date: Estimated date of the first period. Used for countdown tracking.
data_description.family_menarche_age: Age of menarche in the family (mother/sister) used to estimate the expected age.

underwear.title: Period underwear setup
underwear.description: Configure the number of period underwear items and their management settings.

data.underwear_low_clean_threshold: Warn when fewer than N clean items remain
data.underwear_wash_reminder_days: Wash reminder after N days dirty

data_description.underwear_count: How many period underwear items you own (0 = disabled).
data_description.underwear_low_clean_threshold: You will receive a warning when fewer than this number of clean items are available.
data_description.underwear_wash_reminder_days: A wash recommendation is shown when an item has been dirty for longer than this many days.

error.invalid_date: Invalid date format. Please use YYYY-MM-DD.
error.invalid_menarche_age: Age must be a number between 8 and 20.

log_product_usage.name: Log product usage
log_product_usage.description: Log period-product usage for timer integrations and long-term statistics.

action.name: Action
action.description: Usage action, for example used or emptied.

quantity.name: Quantity
quantity.description: How many products or emptying events to add.

date.name: Date
date.description: Optional ISO date to backfill. Defaults to today.

log_product_restock.name: Log product restock
log_product_restock.description: Increase stock of tampons or pads at a location.

update_underwear_status.name: Update underwear status
update_underwear_status.description: Mark a period underwear item as clean or dirty.

get_product_inventory.name: Get product inventory
get_product_inventory.description: Retrieve the current product inventory with low-stock alerts.

update_product_location.name: Move products between locations
update_product_location.description: Transfer tampons or pads from one location to another.

export_shopping_list.name: Export shopping list
export_shopping_list.description: Generate and export a shopping list based on current inventory.
